name: Social Tables Event Diagramming API
what_it_does: Social Tables event diagramming and venue sourcing REST API for hotels, venues, event planners, and hospitality sales teams to create interactive floor plans, manage seating assignments, and connect through venue sourcing tools. Enables AI agents to manage event floor plan creation and room configuration for event layout automation, handle seating chart assignment and guest placement for event seating automation, access venue diagram library and template management for event setup automation, retrieve real-time collaboration and version management for event planning team automation, manage event setup specifications and BEO (Banquet Event Order) generation for venue operations automation, handle venue sourcing and RFP management for event planner venue selection automation, access attendee check-in and capacity tracking for event registration integration automation, retrieve food and beverage layout integration for catering placement automation, manage AV and equipment placement for event production automation, and integrate Social Tables with Cvent event management platform for end-to-end event planning and execution.
use_cases: Creating event floor plans from venue operations automation agents
Assigning guest seating from event management automation agents
Generating BEOs from hotel banquet operations agents
Sourcing venues from corporate event planner agents
not_for: Venue PMS and reservation management (use Momentus or Tripleseat)
Ticketed public event registration (use Eventbrite or Cvent Registration)
Wedding planning full-service (use Honeybook or Zola)
best_when: A hotel banquet department, convention center, event planner, or corporate event team wanting AI agents to automate event floor plan creation, guest seating assignments, BEO generation, and venue sourcing within Social Tables' collaborative event diagramming platform.
avoid_when: CVENT ACQUISITION PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION RISK: Social Tables was acquired by Cvent in 2018; Social Tables functionality is being integrated into Cvent's broader event management platform; evaluate whether Social Tables standalone API or Cvent platform API is the intended long-term integration endpoint for enterprise event management automation. ADA ACCESSIBLE SEATING ASSIGNMENT COMPLIANCE: Automated guest seating assignment via Social Tables must ensure ADA-accessible seats are allocated to guests requiring accessibility accommodations; automated seating algorithm that assigns non-accessible seats to guests with accessibility requirements creates ADA Title III violation for public accommodation events. FLOOR PLAN FIRE CODE CAPACITY ENFORCEMENT: Automated event setup configuration via Social Tables must enforce fire code occupancy limits by room configuration type (theater, banquet, classroom); automated floor plan creation that exceeds fire code capacity for the room configuration type creates fire marshal compliance violation for venue.

auth.notes: Social Tables uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Washington DC HQ. Founded 2011 by Dan Berger. Acquired by Cvent in 2018. Part of Cvent's hospitality cloud. Leading event diagramming and venue sourcing platform. 250,000+ venue spaces diagrammed. Integration with Cvent event management platform. Competes with AllSeated, iVvy, and Momentus for event diagramming.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — subscription for venues and planners
pricing.paid_tiers: Venue subscription and event planner subscription; Cvent bundle pricing for combined event management; API access for enterprise Cvent customers
pricing.notes: Washington DC. Cvent subsidiary since 2018. Venue and planner subscription. Cvent bundle available. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; diagram and seating queries throttled; webhooks for diagram update and collaboration events

known_agent_gotchas: CVENT ACQUISITION API MIGRATION PATH: Social Tables API may migrate to Cvent API platform; new integrations should evaluate whether Cvent Hospitality Cloud API provides equivalent functionality; automated integrations built on Social Tables API should monitor Cvent deprecation notices for Social Tables-specific endpoints as platform consolidation progresses

ROOM CONFIGURATION CAPACITY LOOKUP BEFORE SEATING ASSIGNMENT: Social Tables floor plans have configuration-specific capacity (theater vs banquet vs reception); automated seating assignment must query current room configuration capacity before generating seating chart; seating assignment that exceeds configuration capacity creates non-compliant floor plan violating fire code

REAL-TIME COLLABORATION CONFLICT RESOLUTION: Social Tables supports real-time collaborative floor plan editing; automated diagram updates via API concurrent with human planners editing the same diagram create merge conflicts; automated floor plan generation workflows should implement optimistic locking or scheduled update windows to avoid collaborative editing conflicts

BEO GENERATION REQUIRES COMPLETE SETUP SPECIFICATION: Social Tables BEO generation requires complete event setup specification (room configuration, AV, F&B, linen, staging); automated BEO generation with incomplete setup data creates BEO with missing operational specifications; implement setup specification completeness validation before automated BEO generation

GUEST LIST INTEGRATION FOR PERSONALIZED SEATING: Social Tables seating chart integrates with guest list for personalized name card generation; automated seating workflows importing guest lists must handle duplicate name detection and special character encoding for international attendee names; automated seating chart with malformed guest names creates name card printing errors at event setup
agent_readiness.security_notes: Event diagramming. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Event floor plan, guest seating, and venue operational data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Event diagramming. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Event layout, guest, and venue data.
